evidence.title: Roll Call / Factbase formal FIFA World Cup Drawing transcript capture - no Ronaldo match
evidence.source_description: Roll Call / Factbase transcript page for the formal event 'Donald Trump Attends the FIFA World Cup Drawing in Washington - December 5, 2025,' retrieved/opened 2026-06-29. Web page find check for 'Ronaldo' returned no matching text.
evidence.relevance: Primary transcript source for the formal FIFA World Cup Drawing event; supports defense position that the formal event transcript does not contain Ronaldo and that plaintiff's word use occurred, if at all, in a separate press-gaggle/red-carpet source.

evidence.title: AgentCourt ex02 README source-packet provenance capture
evidence.source_description: Raw GitHub README for AAR example 2, retrieved via web open on 2026-06-29; concise text capture of provenance statements.
evidence.relevance: Shows the starting packet is derived from a draft complaint, not a fresh primary-source archive, and identifies source classes not yet fetched; bears on weight and missing-link analysis.

evidence.title: White House gallery capture - Trump media arrival and World Cup drawing
evidence.source_description: White House gallery page text/alt capture retrieved via web open on 2026-06-29.
evidence.relevance: Primary/official source showing Trump spoke to media after arrival at Kennedy Center to attend the FIFA World Cup drawing and then participated in the drawing; supports event connection and sequence for pre-program remarks.

evidence.title: Roll Call / Factbase press-gaggle transcript capture - Ronaldo in red-carpet material before FIFA event
evidence.source_description: Roll Call / Factbase press-gaggle transcript and Senate Democratic Caucus Trump transcript page, retrieved/opened 2026-06-29. Captures the adverse Ronaldo remarks while also preserving the note that this was red-carpet material before the FIFA event and was pieced together from multiple media sources.
evidence.relevance: Adverse but important source-chain evidence: confirms Ronaldo was said in a press-gaggle/red-carpet transcript, while showing that the source describes the material as before the FIFA event and compiled from several non-official media sources, which bears on whether it was the Kalshi resolution video/transcript.

evidence.title: Kalshi official source/rule structure capture for Trump Mention B series and FIFA World Cup Draw event page
evidence.source_description: Official Kalshi public API series response and public market page text retrieved during defendant argument on 2026-06-29. The market page rendered a visible sibling strike (Canada) for the same FIFA World Cup Draw event, not the Ronaldo strike; capture is used for event rule structure/source-language context, not to prove the Ronaldo outcome by itself.
evidence.relevance: Shows official Kalshi Mention series settlement sources and official page language for the FIFA World Cup Draw event: 'as part of FIFA World Cup Draw,' primary use of video of the draw, transcript fallback to listed publications, press/live-stream qualification, and the event/timeline identifiers. This bears on whether pre-program press remarks are within the covered resolution source.

evidence.title: Bernard Bulletin Kalshi mention dispute ledger capture - Ronaldo entry
evidence.source_description: Substack page text capture retrieved via web open on 2026-06-29; secondary dispute ledger entry for the Kalshi Ronaldo market.
evidence.relevance: Secondary source specifically describing the disputed Kalshi market, the Ronaldo strike, asserted red-carpet/pre-program evidence, rules issue, result, and last trade; corroborates dispute context but is not primary transcript/video.
